question: Quelle architecture multi-agents adopter : writer/reviewer, orchestrator-worker, single-agent avec tool use ?

principles.text: Defaut : single-agent avec tool use. N'adopter un pattern writer/reviewer 2-agents que pour des taches non-triviales multi-fichiers ou un defect specifique est mesure et justifie le surcout token. Eviter les architectures N-agents orchestrator-worker sauf preuve concrete de gains : la litterature est contradictoire. Cognition (Devin team) rapporte que les systemes multi-agents produisent 'fragile systems' en production ; les benchmarks (ACT, DARS, Aider architect) montrent des gains de +3 a +10pp mais au prix d'un token cost x2-3 et de complexity cascade failures (MAST paper, Cemri et al.).

sources.name: Dong et al. 2025 - A Survey on Code Generation with LLM-based Agents (arXiv:2508.00083)
sources.quote: agents in the ChatDev system respectively play roles of programmers, reviewers, and testers

sources.name: Singh et al. 2025 - Enhancing LLM Code Generation (arXiv:2505.02133)
sources.quote: The basic single-agent approach achieved 54.09% accuracy, while the three-agent ACT system reached 57.16%. The combined ACT + Debugger approach achieved 64.82% mean accuracy across 19 language models

sources.name: Cemri et al. 2025 - Why Do Multi-Agent LLM Systems Fail? MAST (arXiv:2503.13657)
sources.quote: 1,600+ annotated traces; 14 unique modes, clustered into 3 categories; their performance gains on popular benchmarks are often minimal

sources.name: Cognition - Don't Build Multi-Agents
sources.quote: running multiple agents in collaboration only results in fragile systems

sources.name: Aider architect/editor benchmark (September 2024)
sources.quote: Pairing o1-preview as Architect with either Deepseek or o1-mini as Editor sets a SOTA significantly above the previous best score

sources.name: He, Treude, Lo 2024/25 - LLM Multi-Agent Systems for SE (ACM TOSEM, arXiv:2404.04834)
sources.quote: systematic review of recent primary studies to map the current landscape of LMA applications across various stages of the software development lifecycle

etd_balance.benefices: Aider architect +30% Polyglot benchmark, capture erreurs writer
etd_balance.risques: Cout 2x tokens, Cemri MAST 14 failure modes observees, fragile systems en prod per Cognition
etd_balance.balance: Equilibre, tendance Benefices si topologie simple 2-role
